channel.title: Server on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Server on Arrans github.io

item.title: google/go-cloud
item.description: The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK): A library and tools for open cloud development in Go.

item.title: emersion/go-smtp
item.description: 📤 An SMTP client & server library written in Go

item.title: zelon88/HRConvert2
item.description: A self-hosted, drag-and-drop & nosql file conversion server & share tool that supports 445 file formats in 13 languages.

item.title: ergochat/ergo
item.description: A modern IRC server (daemon/ircd) written in Go.

item.title: httpswift/swifter
item.description: Tiny http server engine written in Swift programming language.

item.title: zitadel/oidc
item.description: Easy to use OpenID Connect client and server library written for Go and certified by the OpenID Foundation

item.title: emersion/go-imap
item.description: 📥 An IMAP library for clients and servers

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: bleenco/abstruse
item.description: Abstruse is a free and open-source CI/CD platform that tests your models and code.

item.title: ngircd/ngircd
item.description: Free, portable and lightweight Internet Relay Chat server

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.
